gad.label: GAD (full framework)
gad.description: Full GAD framework with .planning/ XML, AGENTS.md loop, skill triggers, per-task planning doc maintenance

bare.label: Bare (no framework)
bare.description: No framework — agent creates its own workflow. Only receives AGENTS.md with requirements and game/.planning/ layout mandate.

emergent.label: Emergent (inherited skills)
emergent.description: No framework but inherits skills from previous runs. Tests whether skill accumulation improves outcomes over rounds.

greenfield.label: Greenfield
greenfield.description: Agent builds from scratch — no existing codebase

brownfield.label: Brownfield
brownfield.description: Agent inherits a baseline codebase from a previous run and extends it

project_families.label: Escape the Dungeon
project_families.description: Roguelike dungeon crawler — primary eval vehicle across all rounds

project_families.label: GAD Explainer Video
project_families.description: Remotion composition — planned eval for video generation workflows

project_families.label: Skill Evaluation App
project_families.description: Interactive requirements editor — planned eval for tooling workflows
